title: C2PA Manifest Store — Specification v1.x (1.0–1.3)
description: JSON schema for a C2PA Manifest Store as defined in C2PA Technical Specification v1.x (versions 1.0 through 1.3). This covers the original claim structure (c2pa.claim) before the v2.0 breaking changes. Key characteristics: free-text claim_generator, single assertions array, X.509 or other credential types permitted, no structured validation_results.

version_timeline.1.0: Initial release. c2pa.actions (v1), c2pa.ingredient (v1), c2pa.hash.data, c2pa.hash.bmff (v1).
version_timeline.1.1: c2pa.hash.bmff.v2 introduced with improved security over v1.

key_characteristics.claim_structure: c2pa.claim (v1) — single assertions array, free-text claim_generator string, dc:format field present, assertion metadata at claim level
key_characteristics.trust_model: X.509 certificates or other credential types. No mandatory C2PA Trust List.
key_characteristics.validation: Flat validation_status array only. No validation_results, no validation_state.

assertion_labels.c2pa.actions: v1 actions assertion. No digitalSourceType, no allActionsIncluded.
assertion_labels.c2pa.actions.v2: Introduced in 1.3. Added digitalSourceType per action.
assertion_labels.c2pa.ingredient: v1 ingredient. parentOf and componentOf relationships only.
assertion_labels.c2pa.ingredient.v2: Late 1.x / early 2.0. Adds data and description fields.
assertion_labels.c2pa.hash.data: Hard binding over asset byte ranges.
assertion_labels.c2pa.hash.bmff: v1 BMFF hard binding. Deprecated in 2.0 in favor of v2.
assertion_labels.c2pa.thumbnail.claim: Thumbnail of the asset at signing time.

validation_status.description: Flat validation list. Only format available in v1.x.

format.description: IANA media type of the asset. Present in claim.v1 (v1.x); removed in claim.v2 (v2.0+).

claim_generator.description: Free-text generator identifier. The only generator field in v1.x claims.

assertions.description: Single flat assertions array (no created_assertions / gathered_assertions split).

Ingredient.description: v1.x ingredients. 'inputTo' relationship did not exist. data/description fields only in v2 variant (late 1.x).

label.description: Standard v1.x labels: c2pa.actions, c2pa.actions.v2 (1.3+), c2pa.ingredient, c2pa.ingredient.v2, c2pa.hash.data, c2pa.hash.bmff, c2pa.hash.bmff.v2, c2pa.metadata, c2pa.thumbnail.claim, c2pa.thumbnail.ingredient
